review_excerpts: Honeycomb is purpose-built for high-cardinality observability. Nothing else comes close for distributed tracing.
BubbleUp query interface is genuinely innovative. Find anomalies in minutes that would take hours in Datadog.
Events-based pricing is predictable — much easier to budget for serverless and container workloads.
Smaller vendor with passionate support team. Response times are excellent.
Limited ecosystem vs Datadog. Some integrations require custom instrumentation.
g2._note: G2 live scrape blocked; rating from mock research
